# Thanus Theiventhiram — Portfolio

> Personal portfolio of Thanus Theiventhiram, a BEng (Hons) Software Engineering student, AarasTech Co-Founder, Full Stack Developer and UI/UX Designer from Jaffna, Sri Lanka.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Introduction, highlights, achievements and quick links.
- [About](/about): Background, career goals, technologies, achievements and certificates.
- [Projects](/projects): 30+ projects across Full Stack, IoT, Game, UI/UX and WordPress.
- [Services](/services): Web development, WordPress, UI/UX, AI posters, academic support and CV creation.
- [Education](/education): BEng (Hons) Software Engineering, HND Distinction and academic timeline.
- [Experience](/experience): AarasTech Co-Founder, Student Council President, WordPress Developer roles.
- [Contact](/contact): Email, phone, location and social profiles.
